Shaumugam, Vice-Chairman, Central Administrative tribunal, Madras Beuch to act as Olairman, Central Administrative Tribunal, witheffeetfrom the 19th January, 2007 until the date on which a new Chairman, appointed in accordance with the provisions of Administrative Tnbunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985) enters upon his office, or the date on which Shri Justice P.
